text.message: wow great, my game is ruined hahaha

robbing last place?

you have to evaluate what is happening on the board
I have the worst game ahead
I'm just spreading the love

rob your competition, I have no wheat no wood and no expansions
yeah, so block orange or blue, not the last place
I have the worst game ahead, no way I am giving 1:1
lol red asking for 2 cards on their turn
but look at the board,
i will just wait for my brick and let you 7 out
if you want to self sabotage be our gues
guest

or i can take you under
and you get value because you don't lose 4 cards
and you get a card you dont make
I was accepting that last offer
you should be reasonable and try to understand, my game was accepting having a 3 and a 12 as initial settles cuz I was expanding
Now that I am double plowed, my game is dead
You have a city in hand
yeah you picked bad and you are making it everyone elses problem while being annoying

no wheat no wood here? easy to see
whining because you suck at picking settle spots
I am just trying to balance the game, blue, dont be upset please
saying don't be upset after being as annoying as possible because you are already upset is hilarious
I am not upset, just trying to balance the game friend
Wtf
sorry, it is my guess that you are winning black, sorry
Solo is crazy

yeah maybe
what a steal that trade was for red
giving 2 wheat for essentially free to them
